6/4/25, 2:12‚ÄØPM - √ÇHM‚àÜD W@√ëD@¬Æ: *üì¢ Official Announcement from ELS (Engineers Layyan's Society) ‚Äì UET Taxila*

It has come to our notice that a *Saraiki Student Council (SSC)* has recently been established at UET Taxila. While we respect the formation of cultural and regional student platforms, *ELS is a unified community with a clear vision and high standards, and dual memberships are strictly not allowed.*

We would like to address the following:

1. *ELS members who have joined SSC but are not part of its cabinet* are required to immediately leave SSC and all its associated groups.


2. *ELS members who are holding cabinet positions in SSC*  are given two options:

  *Option 1:* Formally resign from SSC and their cabinet role. SSC must then publish an official announcement declaring the resignation and name the new member who has taken the position.

      *Option 2:* The member must leave SSC entirely, including all associated groups. SSC must then update its cabinet poster accordingly.



üîÅ *In both cases, SSC is required to publish the respective update (resignation or revised cabinet poster) on all its official social media platforms, including Instagram and Facebook.*

*‚ùóNon-compliance with these instructions will result in immediate removal from ELS.*

_We want to make it clear that ELS (Engineers Layyan's Community) values unity, loyalty, and representation of its people without divided affiliations. Members with dual commitments compromise the integrity of our platform, and such cases will not be tolerated._

*_With respect,_*
*_ELS Cabinet 2K22_*

#els_unity_matters
#no_dual_commitments
#oneCommunity_oneVision
#respect_the_standards
